tagline: Pools and Gardens for Fine Homes

hero.headline:
Luxury Pools Designed for
Distinguished Living
hero.subheadline: For over 40 years, Dallas-Fort Worth's most discerning homeowners have trusted Harold Leidner to design and build pools, gardens, and outdoor environments that elevate their homes. From concept to completion, we handle every detail so you simply enjoy the result.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Bespoke Outdoor Environments<br class="hidden md:block"> for Exceptional Homes
services.subtitle: From resort-style pools to curated gardens and complete outdoor living spaces, we bring four decades of design mastery to every project across Dallas-Fort Worth.

cards.title: Custom Pools & Spas
cards.description: Luxury swimming pools and spas designed to complement your home's architecture. Every detail crafted for beauty, function, and lasting value.

cards.title: Water Features & Fountains
cards.description: Elegant fountains, waterfalls, and reflecting pools that add tranquility and visual drama to your outdoor environment.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Complete outdoor kitchen design with premium materials and appliances. Built for entertaining at the highest level.

cards.title: Garden & Landscape Design
cards.description: Full-service landscape architecture creating lush, curated gardens and plantings that frame your home in natural beauty.

cards.title: Outdoor Structures
cards.description: Custom pergolas, pavilions, and cabanas that extend your living space into the landscape with style and sophistication.

cards.title: Landscape Lighting
cards.description: Professional lighting design that highlights key features, creates ambiance, and transforms your property for evening enjoyment.

how_it_works.headline: Your Vision, Brought to Life in Three Steps

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: We begin by listening. Tell us how you want to live outdoors, and we'll visit your property to understand the space, the architecture, and your aspirations.

steps.title: We Design & Refine
steps.description: Our award-winning team creates a comprehensive design that integrates pools, gardens, structures, and lighting into one cohesive outdoor environment tailored to you.

steps.title: We Build, You Enjoy
steps.description: Our in-house construction team brings the design to life with meticulous craftsmanship. We manage every detail from groundbreaking through your first evening outdoors.

about.label: Why Dallas Trusts Harold Leidner
about.headline: 40 Years of Turning Backyards Into Works of Art
about.description: Since 1984, Harold Leidner Landscape Architects has been the premier design-build firm for luxury outdoor environments in Dallas-Fort Worth. With three offices across the metroplex and a portfolio featured in Architectural Digest, we bring an unmatched combination of artistry, horticultural expertise, and construction excellence to every project. Our clients — from Highland Park estates to Fort Worth ranches — trust us because we listen first and deliver beyond expectations.

features.title: Award-Winning Design Team
features.description: A 14-time Best of Houzz winner and Architectural Digest Pro Directory member. Our designs have been featured in major national publications.

features.title: Complete Design-to-Build Process
features.description: One firm from first sketch to final walkthrough. No hand-offs, no miscommunication — just seamless execution from concept to completion.

features.title: Three DFW Offices, One Standard
features.description: Highland Park, Carrollton, and Fort Worth locations ensure responsive service across the entire Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex.

pricing.headline: Transparent Investment. Exceptional Value.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-designed. We provide detailed proposals so you know exactly what to expect — no surprises, no hidden costs.

guarantee.headline: Our "Design Excellence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project we build. If any element of our work does not meet the standards presented in your approved design, we will correct it at our expense. Our reputation is built on four decades of delivering outdoor environments that exceed expectations, and we intend to keep it that way.

faqs.question: How long does a typical pool and landscape project take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool and landscape projects take 3-6 months from design approval to completion, depending on scope and complexity. We provide a detailed timeline during the design phase so you know exactly what to expect at every stage.

faqs.question: Do you handle the entire project or just design?
faqs.answer: We are a full design-build firm. Our team handles everything from the initial concept and architectural drawings through construction, planting, lighting, and final walkthrough. One team, one vision, one point of contact.

faqs.question: What areas of Dallas-Fort Worth do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire DFW metroplex from our three offices in Highland Park, Carrollton, and Fort Worth. Our projects span Highland Park, University Park, Preston Hollow, Southlake, Westlake, and surrounding luxury communities.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after the project?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our Concierge Maintenance program ensures your landscape investment stays beautiful year-round. From seasonal plantings to pool care, we protect and maintain what we build.

faqs.question: What makes Harold Leidner different from other landscape firms?
faqs.answer: Four decades of experience, a 14-time Best of Houzz track record, features in Architectural Digest, and celebrity clients like Troy Aikman. We are not just contractors — we are landscape architects who design outdoor environments as works of art.

testimonials.name: Troy Aikman
testimonials.text: Very pleased with our experience. We have used Harold's services on our last two homes and would use again.

testimonials.name: Somer G.
testimonials.text: They turned our backyard into an incredible space. Professional and courteous. Completed on schedule, looks absolutely beautiful.

testimonials.name: Richard D.
testimonials.text: Harold's creative landscape designs consistently enhance the setting and architecture of a home.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Living?
contact.subtitle: Schedule a complimentary design consultation. We will visit your property, listen to your vision, and show you what is possible.

footer.description: Award-winning landscape architects. Designing luxury outdoor environments in Dallas-Fort Worth since 1984.
